# Cache Term

## Glossary terms
Cache means the bounded in-process cache used by the widget fixture.

## Conventions and preferences
Use this term when discussing the fixture cache so downstream tickets do not reopen naming.

## Heuristics and nuances
This is the single needed durable record for the current conclusion; implementation work needs its own ticket later.
